name: Hottolink, Inc.
summary: Hottolink, Inc. offers social media marketing support that collects, analyzes, and utilizes social big data in Japan. It provides an information distribution platform that connects consumers and AI; and Twitter marketing support, Instagram marketing support, content marketing, social listening tool, market-specific media, and information dissemination services, as well as data analysis and video material. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
